What exactly is queerness and how should we define it? For this group, queer identity is about more than who you’re kissing. Their queerness emerges through their external expression. Through their nonlinear, arresting visual representation and their determination to live as open-hearted as the soul can bear, comes the extreme beauty of knowing oneself. - THE CUT

Beauty journalism would not exist without Linda Wells. In 1990, Wells made magazine history when she became the founding editor-in-chief of Allure, Condé Nast’s first-ever beauty publication, which quickly became one of the most influential “beauty bibles” in the industry. In 2015, after 25 years at the helm, she left the magazine to begin a new chapter. - THE CUT
